services.title: Professional Services
services.subtitle: A full-service approach to creating exceptional fashion and commercial content.

casting.name: Casting & Talent Booking
casting.description: We streamline the casting process, providing a curated selection of elite talent perfectly matched to your project's creative vision and brand identity. Our extensive network ensures access to the industry's most sought-after and emerging faces.

production.name: Campaign Production Support
production.description: Beyond talent, we offer comprehensive production support. From location scouting and crew assembly to logistics and on-set management, our team ensures a seamless execution of your campaign from concept to completion.

creative.name: Creative Direction
creative.description: Collaborate with our in-house creative experts to develop and refine your campaign's aesthetic. We provide art direction, mood boarding, and styling consultation to ensure your vision is realized with sophistication and impact.

home.hero_subtitle: Your face. Your brand. Your career.
home.connect_with_us: Connect with us to find the perfect talent for your next project.

pamela.desc1: As the crowning jewel of VB VISION, Pamela Nelson represents the absolute pinnacle of editorial elegance. With a magnetic presence that dominates the lens, she has become our most requested talent for high-fashion campaigns.
pamela.desc2: A veteran of the runway and a favorite of avant-garde designers, Pamela has claimed victory on multiple international stages, redefining what it means to be a modern muse. Her portfolio is not just a collection of images—it is a testament to versatility, poise, and an unyielding dedication to the art of modeling.

about.title: The Vision Behind VB VISION
about.subtitle: We are more than a model agency; we are curators of iconic talent and architects of luxury presence.
about.brand_p1: VB VISION operates at the intersection of high fashion and high art. We represent a meticulously selected roster of talent who not only define trends but also embody the essence of modern luxury. Our commitment is to elevate brands by providing faces that tell a story, evoke emotion, and create unforgettable campaigns.
about.brand_p2: Our approach is bespoke, our standards are exacting, and our vision is global. We connect the world's most prestigious brands with talent that possesses a rare combination of editorial appeal and commercial viability.
about.value1_desc: We champion unique, undeniable talent. Quality over quantity is the cornerstone of our roster.
about.value2_desc: Integrity, reliability, and excellence are at the heart of every interaction and booking.
about.value3_desc: We build lasting relationships with our models and clients, fostering careers and brand growth with strategic guidance.
about.join_subtitle: Let's shape the future of fashion together.

sponsored.label: Partnership
sponsored.title: Natural Pills
sponsored.subtitle: The secret to vitality and focus during high-intensity sessions.
sponsored.description: Formulated for peak performance, Natural Pills provide the essential nutrients needed to maintain energy levels and mental clarity. Preferred by top talent for demanding production schedules.
sponsored.promo_text: NATURAL PILLS • ENERGY & FOCUS • PREMIUM SUPPLEMENT • LIMITED EDITION •

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro_text: Your privacy is important to VB Models. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you use our services.
privacy.collect_text: We collect information that you provide directly to us:
privacy.collect_item1: Name, email address, and contact details during registration or inquiry.
privacy.collect_item2: Physical data, portfolio, and measurements (for models).
privacy.usage_item3: Improving the functionality of our platform.
privacy.sharing_text: We do not sell your data. We share information with potential clients (for models) or production teams solely for the purpose of fulfilling a professional engagement.
privacy.security_text: We implement modern technical measures to protect information from unauthorized access or disclosure.
privacy.rights_text: You have the right to request access, correction, or deletion of your personal data at any time by contacting us.

terms_page.title: Terms of Service
terms_page.gen_text: By using the services of VB Models, you agree to these Terms of Service. These conditions govern the relationship between the agency, the models, and the clients.
terms_page.reg_text: Users undertake to provide true and up-to-date information. Applying for a model position does not automatically guarantee representation by the agency.
terms_page.book_text: All model bookings are confirmed only through a written agreement. Image usage rights (Usage Rights) are negotiated individually for each project.
terms_page.resp_text: VB Models acts as an intermediary between the model and the client. The agency is not responsible for the actions of third parties during the production shoots.
terms_page.intel_text: The content of this website, including the logo, design, and texts, is the property of VB Models and is protected by copyright laws.
terms_page.term_text: The agency reserves the right to terminate access to its services for users who violate these terms or damage the brand's reputation.

legal_page.title: Legal Information
legal_page.disclaimer_text: VB Models makes every effort to ensure the accuracy of the information on this website. However, we do not guarantee that the content is always up-to-date or error-free. The use of information is at the user's own risk.
legal_page.links_text: This site may contain links to external websites. VB Models is not responsible for the content or privacy policies of these external sites.

booking_page.title: Book a Model
booking_page.subtitle: Secure elite talent for your project through our streamlined booking system.
booking_page.selection_limit: You can select up to 3 models.
